scope: J/K/L group round three candidate probability mapping; no final portfolio, no stake allocation, no execution language.

method.model_probability_sources: Use red-team-after/final 1X2 probabilities, official xG/top-score/totals from J/K/L prediction JSON, and Poisson-derived margin/HTFT buckets where the prediction file does not directly publish a betting-settlement probability.
method.market_probability_sources: Use no-vig probabilities from same-source snapshots when present; otherwise null.
method.edge_threshold: +/-0.03 treated as the noise band for discussion-only mapping.
method.handicap_translation_guard: Every handicap candidate includes its real full-time settlement condition.

red_team_after_release.note: Probabilities are for candidate mapping only; no final ticket or stake is generated.

edge_or_no_edge.note: Model probability exceeds no-vig market probability; still gated by discussion_only_hold.

one_x_two.settlement_condition: Algeria must win in 90-minute full time.

edge_or_no_edge.note: Difference is inside the small-sample/noise band.

handicap_wdl.settlement_condition: Algeria +1 draw means Austria wins by exactly 1 goal(s).
handicap_wdl.model_direction: Exact-margin bucket from Poisson margin distribution.

edge_or_no_edge.note: Model probability exceeds no-vig market probability; still gated by discussion_only_hold.

handicap_wdl.settlement_condition: Algeria +1 loss means Austria wins by 2 or more goals.
handicap_wdl.model_direction: Handicap non-cover/cover-against bucket from Poisson margin distribution.
